title: ModelEngine-Group/nexent
description: Nexent is a zero-code platform for auto-generating production-grade AI agents using Harness Engineering principles — unified tools, skills, memory, and orchestration with built-in constraints, feedback loops, and control planes.

title: WakeUp-Jin/Practical-Guide-to-Context-Engineering
description: 大模型应用开发的方向，上下文工程是设计原则，Agent Harness 是构建目标，本项目的目标，是为开发者和研究者提供一份大模型应用开发的骨架思路

title: AltimateAI/altimate-code
description: Open-source agentic data engineering harness for dbt, SQL, and cloud warehouses. 100+ tools, 10 warehouses, AI-powered.

title: Picrew/awesome-agent-harness
description: An awesome list of Agent Harness engineering resources, including GitHub projects, tools, benchmarks, and practical guides.

title: bytedance/deer-flow
description: An open-source long-horizon SuperAgent harness that researches, codes, and creates. With the help of sandboxes, memories, tools, skill, subagents and message gateway, it handles different levels of tasks that could take minutes to hours.

title: can1357/oh-my-pi
description: ⌥  AI Coding agent for the terminal — hash-anchored edits, optimized tool harness, LSP, Python, browser, subagents, and more

title: rohitg00/agentmemory
description: #1 Persistent memory for AI coding agents based on real-world benchmarks

title: first-fluke/oh-my-agent
description: Portable multi-agent harness for .agents-based skills, workflows, and standards-aware agent teams across Antigravity, Claude Code, Codex, Cursor, OpenCode, and more.

SpaceMind: A Modular and Self-Evolving Embodied Vision-Language Agent Framework for Autonomous On-orbit Servicing
description: Autonomous on-orbit servicing demands embodied agents that perceive through visual sensors, reason about 3D spatial situations, and execute multi-phase tasks over extended horizons. We present SpaceMind, a modular and self-evolving vision-language model (VLM) agent framework that decomposes knowledge, tools, and reasoning into three independently extensible dimensions: skill modules with dynamic r
authors: Aodi Wu, Haodong Han, Xubo Luo

title: MCPThreatHive: Automated Threat Intelligence for Model Context Protocol Ecosystems
description: The rapid proliferation of Model Context Protocol (MCP)-based agentic systems has introduced a new category of security threats that existing frameworks are inadequately equipped to address. We present MCPThreatHive, an open-source platform that automates the end-to-end lifecycle of MCP threat intelligence: from continuous, multi-source data collection through AI-driven threat extraction and class
authors: Yi Ting Shen, Kentaroh Toyoda, Alex Leung

title: Chachamaru127/claude-code-harness: Claude Code 専用開発ハーネス - 自律的なPlan→Work→Reviewサイクルによる高品質開発の実現 · GitHub
description: Claude Codeの能力を信頼性の高い開発ループに変える。
